name: Skewered Fish with Honey-Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm white fish fillets (preferably halibut, turbot, or monkfish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into large cubes and place in a dish. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
2. Cut onions into wedges and combine with mushrooms in a bowl. Add pepper, oil (in a 2:1 ratio to lemon juice), and lemon juice. Let flavors absorb for at least an hour.
3. Halve bacon rashers, remove rinds, and roll loosely.
4. Prepare the sauce by beating honey, mustard, and egg yolk in a bowl. Gradually add vinegar, whisking continuously. Add oil from a jug in thin streams while whisking until thick and creamy. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Assemble skewers with fish, onions, mushrooms, bacon rolls, and tomatoes.
6. Grill for 10 minutes or so under medium-high heat, turning occasionally and basting with marinade liquid.
7. Serve immediately with rice; provide sauce separately.
